blocking_findings.summary: Exact-window predicates accept irregular interior timestamps.
blocking_findings.smallest_remedy: Require every adjacent timestamp in each feature and episode window to be a distinct five-minute successor, add irregular/duplicate timestamp regressions, and rebuild all dependent hashes and artifacts.

blocking_findings.summary: An epsilon residual OI reduction is treated as materially retained parent-qualified OI reset.
blocking_findings.smallest_remedy: Explicitly freeze the quantitative retained-material-OI rule before outcomes, add equality and epsilon boundary tests, and rebuild all dependent hashes and artifacts.

blocking_findings.summary: Funding attachment uses a candidate address duplicated across the 1h and 6h definitions and fails one-to-one after prices are opened.
blocking_findings.smallest_remedy: Attach funding with the unique Level-3 definition-event address, preserve the candidate address separately, and add a two-horizon funding identity regression.
